# PostSoma DevLibrary (205022.xyz)

PostSoma DevLibrary is a curated guide through the landscape of free programming and software engineering learning resources. It translates a raw index of 5,000+ bilingual items into a comparable choice space of random curations, search archive, and explainable recommendations.

---

## 1. Catalog Access & Data Schema

The entire catalog database is available as a single machine-readable JSON array at [resources.json](https://205022.xyz/data/resources.json).
For schema definitions, field metadata types, and verification guidelines, check the [CATALOG_CONTRACT.md](https://github.com/kewenzhe-oss/PostSoma-DevLibrary/blob/main/docs/delivery/CATALOG_CONTRACT.md) (or local clone repository file).

---

## 2. Recommendation Engine Policy

Recommendations generated at `/recommend` are derived through strict catalog constraint filtering:
- Only resources registered inside the catalog database are allowed.
- Recommended lists present exactly 3 different angles: "Quick Start", "Comprehensive", and "Project-oriented".
- All AI recommendations compare trade-offs, advantages, and limitations based on static evidence. We uphold a No Single Truth policy, with no claim of a single "correct authority path."
